name: pr_cep_c_win_bind_notfn
_finding: CEP E2 item C §1a (D-139) DISCRIMINATOR: windowed sum($v:val) whose source ALSO BINDS $w:oth (a var the function never reads). Updating oth RE-fires — so the windowed watch mask is the full source-BINDING set (bind_fields), not merely the function's arguments. Proves the rule is bindings, not fn-args. engine==oracle: W2 twice.
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0($v : val, $w : oth) over window:time(200ms); $s : sum($v) ) then end
